notes: Starts and runs out of the Box but the Resolution doesnt fit or some Ingame Buttons are invisible. So at my Resoultion (1920x1080) i dont see any relevant Menuitems as Singleplayer, Options, Exit or something. If i move my mouse i can hear that there are (or should be) some functioning Ingame-Buttons but if i click... it does nothing. So... at this state it is unplayable.
title: Heli Heroes

notes: This game cannot be played in Proton or vanilla wine, with different tweaks it is possible to reach menus but that's the end of story. Menus are invisible and I found no solution to make it visible. Game needs CD key and there's no way to enter it. I tried to run it from Windows 7 in compatibility mode but it failed to start. Dunno if there's any system that can run it.
title: Heli Heroes
